lines.speaker: Rusty
lines.text: Hiya. Are you carrying anything valuable?

lines.speaker: Rusty
lines.text: Um... It's a quiz. I'm asking everyone I meet if they're carrying anything valuable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would you do if I said I had loads of expensive items with me?

lines.speaker: Rusty
lines.text: Ooh, do you? It's been ages since anyone said they'd got anything worth stealing.

lines.speaker: Rusty
lines.text: Um... Not that I'd dream of stealing anything!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll say I'm not carrying anything valuable at all.
